execSummary.narrative: 7 months of FY2026 Service activity reported, $3.4M invoiced YTD. Run-rate annualizes to $5.83M against the $6.8M plan, a $974K shortfall (14.3% uplift needed).

actionableRecommendations: Annualized Service pace is $974K short of the $6.8M plan. 14.3% uplift needed on remaining months.

watch: 144 work orders are In Progress 14+ days. Oldest: WO 00201259 (72 days, Ernest Bedell). Should be closed or escalated.

2660 appointments have no Actual End — either still in progress or never closed out. Likely a data hygiene problem in Salesforce.
